Hello World

Jan 6, 2020 » dev

This is a hello world.

Hello World!

Code block

A C++ Example:

#include <iostream>

int main(void)
{
	std::cout << "Hello World!" << std::endl;
	return 0;
}

as you can see, everything ok.
